name: design-craft
description: Evidence-based visual & interface design — seven evidence skills (composition & design-theory — the arrangement/structure specialist; graphical perception & colour; Tufte charting; UX & layout; typography; branding/visual-identity; imagery — selecting/critiquing/directing photos & illustration, not generating them) plus three style skills — house-style-templates (design-craft's own house-look templates — WORK IN PROGRESS), developing-style — invents a new, distinctive style from scratch, and brand-absorption (capture an existing brand to direct a facelift or reskin). Each separates proven findings [STRONG] from established convention [CONVENTION] from myth [MYTH], cites the study or named authority, and ships a zero-dependency worked gallery. All the skills apply together on every piece (brand-absorption excepted — it activates only for adopting an existing brand), so they read as one toolkit. BUILDS ON Anthropic's frontend-design plugin: install that too — design-craft sets the design (composition, UI, charts, colour, type, brand identity, imagery) and frontend-design implements it in production-grade code; frontend-design is a design fallback only for gaps, weak leans, user disagreement, or a drastic directional change. design-craft's accessibility + chart-honesty floor is absolute.
